entry.title: Expired Useful Life” and “Expired Periods”
entry.content:
We have observed that the fields “Expired Useful Life” and “Expired Periods” are not displayed in the asset master for asset 280036, as the asset was capitalized in the current fiscal year.

However, for asset 280033, these fields are visible since the asset capitalization occurred in prior fiscal years, where depreciation periods have already elapsed.

entry.title: Unable to get ISBP number in DMEE file
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We are configured Brazill DMEE structure but required ISBP code to get into payment file but there is no field available in standard SAP to get into the file. Let us know how to get ISBP number in DMEE file and find the attachment for your reference.

Regards:

Amaresh

entry.title: Need Assistance in Checking the Feasibility of Increasing the Decimal Values.
entry.content:
In transaction code AR29N (Revaluation/New Valuation of Assets), under the tab Index-Based New Valuation, we have a requirement to increase the decimal precision. Currently, the system appears to allow only 2 decimal places.

For example:
Index Value: 10.34321

  However, in the Index for New Valuation of Assets field under the Index Base New Valuation tab, the system only accepts 10.34 instead of 10.34321 which results deviation in expected output.

Could you please provide a solution to increase the decimal count for this field?

 

Thanks & Regards,

Yash K

entry.title: GBP vs USD currency total not matching with exchange rate
entry.content:
Dear Team,

For W102 company code GL account 70502010, there are 38 lineitems.

  • Local Currency (LC1): GBP
  • Local Currency 2 (LC2): USD
  • At the individual line-item level, the calculated exchange rate (USD/GBP) is approximately 1.31, with slight variations due to daily exchange rate fluctuations.

Issue observed:

  1. when we are totaling of 38line items and doing USD/GBP the rate is -8.79, which differs significantly from the line-item exchange rates. 

      2. GBP total -21,150.08 and the USD total in positive 185,929.08,

Please help on above queries.

Excel attached for reference

Regards,

Prasanna.K

entry.title: Translation of Own explanation field in payment terms
entry.content:
We want to maintain the translations in German and Dutch for 'Own Explanation' field in payment terms 

We checked that the Sales Text field translations work when the payment terms is defined for customer. But this does not work for vendor payment terms.

we referred two SAP notes (3427139 and 710252) but could not get the answer.

Request your help.

regards,

entry.title: PO Short Text - Supplier Invoice Line Item Text
entry.content:
Hi,

we are using public cloud and want to copy the text of the purchase order item to the FI supplier invoice line item during posting of the supplier invoice.

This functionality already exists for the goods received posting and is described in the note https://me.sap.com/notes/2921484/en-US.

As we have purchase orders without goods received posting, we would need this functionality also for posting of the supplier invoice.

Does anyone know if this will be a standard feature soon?

BR

entry.title: FBl1 and FBL1n 1000 of layout are missing
entry.content: FBl1 and FBL1n 1000 of user Layout is missing

entry.title: Result Analysis - Overall Plan Values - Planned Costs and Revenues
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

I'm configuring result analysis and i'm having difficulties to understand one of the configuration values of the field "Overall Plan" in the "Planned Values" tab inside OKG3 (expert mode), result analysis.

If the value of this field has the "With Breakdown stucture values" then result analysis takes into account all method for WBS cost planning like Overall/Annual simple cost planning (CJ40), Unit Costing, Detailed Planning (CJR2), Order Costing.

If the value has not the "with breakdown structure values" then results analysis takes into account just the Order Costing (Network order for example). For example if I use the "Annual Plan" = "C", the planned costs in result analysis equals Network costing.

I do not understand what is just the "Overall Planning", value "B". It seems to ignore every planning method. I didn't find any documentation about it.

Do you know where it takes the planning values?

entry.title: MR21 – New Price Field Greyed Out – Standard Price Not Updating for Materials (Plant 1701)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are facing an issue while attempting to update the standard price using transaction MR21 for the following materials in Plant 1701:

  • BI_DRYPIT_SKULL
  • COBBLES
  • MILLS_SCALE
  • MISS_ROLLHEAVY
  • MISS_ROLLLIGHT
  • PCM_SKULL
  • RUNNER_LADLE_SKULL
  • SPONGEIRON_FINES
  • TUNDISH_SKULL

Issue Details

  • While executing transaction MR21, the “New Price” field is greyed out.
  • Due to this, we are unable to update the standard price for the above materials.
  • This issue is occurring consistently for all the above materials.

System Impact

  • The issue is observed in the QAS (Quality) server.

Expected Behavior

entry.title: 0.01 Price difference in 34 depre are
entry.content:
Hello teacher

 

We have a price difference in 34 depreaciation area.

 

We ran KO88 to settlement inverstment order 532020 to Fix assets.

 

The Net book value of 01 book depreciation and 30 group depreciation are all settled to  zero,

 

But we still have 0.01 price difference in 34 depreciation area.

 

Could you please support us?How to fix this problem?

 

I try to use T-code ABAB and ABMA,but I can't solve this problem.Because 34 depreciation is generated automatically,I can't do any manual postings.

entry.title: CO03 display using Cost Trend layout with no plan cost
entry.content: CO03 display using Cost Trend layout with no plan cost, but when I just choose this layout again, plan cost displayed correctly .

entry.title: Hi Team, Activate Mass changes all items of a document,FAGLL03H, FBL3H, FBL1H, FBL5H, Mass Change
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Activate Mass  changes all items of a document,transaction code -FAGLL03H, FBL3H, FBL1H, FBL5H.

 

Thanks and Regards

Pramoda shetty

entry.title: Remaining value in the asset even after completion of useful life
entry.content:
We have certain assets in our system, wherein their useful life has been completed, but there is still some value that remains in the asset, we use the ‘day wise depreciation’ method.

Now the depreciation on the said asset was last run in FY 2023, now the system is not allowing us to calculate the unplanned depreciation, since the FY 2023 is already closed & we cannot keep more than 2 fiscal years open in the system.

entry.title: Pain XML Output
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Wie have a problem with a DMEE structure in the new Pain09. We implemented CGI_XML_CT_V9 with the KBA 2253571. Everything seems fine but the Bank always gives us error messages back.

 

Even if some structures are filled they says it is wrong. An other Problem is, when we generate the XML it doesn’t fill out all needed field.

 

Can you please help us?

entry.title: Difference Between AA Reports and GL Reports – AUC BS accounts
entry.content:
We identified a discrepancy between values shown in Asset Accounting (AA) reports and General Ledger (GL) account reports for Assets Under Construction (AuC). After investigation, the difference appears to be related to down payments that are posted to a technical account according to the current configuration. 

Issue Description 

  • In AA reports, the full amount is displayed under the balance sheet GL account assigned to the AuC. 

  •

entry.title: fbl1 t.code more then 1000 layout is missing in the production system
entry.content: in t.code fbl1  most of the business use the t.code they has created more layout as per there requirement but we are not able to find the layout that is created by the business user

entry.title: OBYC Account Determination for GBB and ZOF – Balance Sheet Account versus P&L Account
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have the following issue: In OBYC, for transaction/event key GBB and general modification ZOF, a balance sheet account is assigned for one valuation class (ROH). For all other transactions and modifications, including GBB + ZOF with other valuation classes (HALB, FERT), P&L accounts are assigned instead.

I did not set up this customizing myself, and unfortunately there is nobody left whom I could ask about the original intention.

As a result, the balance sheet account keeps accumulating balances continuously. Is there any possible reason why this could have been configured this way? Otherwise, I would change it to a P&L account and correct the postings that have already been made.

Thank you very much for any support and best regards,

Herbert

entry.title: Creating Customized Internal Order Report, which provides all the details about the IOs created.
entry.content:
Hi ,

We require your support and assistance to fix an ABAP runtime error encountered in the T code  ZFI_BUDGETIO_REPORT in the SAP ECC system.

Background:

  • The IO Report was recently customized and transported to Production last week.
  • Based on user requirements, additional tables were incorporated into the report logic.

Tables currently used:

  • Existing: COEP, COSP, AUFK, COBK, BKPF, BSEG, EBKN, EBAN, BSET

The report was enhanced to fetch and display all required data; however, users are now facing a runtime error while executing the report at foreground, but when we execute are background, it is taking 30K seconds (8hrs) to generate report for 1 month data. 

Thanks,

Lohith

entry.title: Issue is in DME, While migrating classic to Sepa dme , format change required for remittance advice
entry.content: While changing from classic to Sepa DME remittance advice form change needed

entry.title: Issue is in DME, While migrating classic to Sepa dme , format change required for remittance advice
entry.content:
While changing from classic to Sepa DME remittance advice form changes needed 

  • For France suppliers, Both the body of email and Remittance advice should be generated in French.
  • For suppliers other than France country both the email body and remittance advice should be generated in Engilsh.
